languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

languages.text: "Блестяще! Вы ухватили самую суть и емко ее сформулировали. Нунциус, запомни формулировку Вольного Торговца, я приобщу ее к каталогу своих доводов. Верно ли я понимаю, что мы пришли к консенсусу?"

"Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

languages.text: «¡Brillante! Ha comprendido la clave del asunto y lo ha articulado de forma concisa. Nuncius, tome nota de las palabras de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente y añádalas a mi catálogo de argumentos. ¿Estoy en lo cierto al creer que hemos llegado a un consenso?».
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Brillante! Ha comprendido la clave del asunto y lo ha articulado de forma concisa. Nuncius, tome nota de las palabras de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente y añádalas a mi catálogo de argumentos. ¿Estoy en lo cierto al creer que hemos llegado a un consenso?».

languages.text: “精彩！您已经抓住了问题的核心，而且言简意赅。努恩修斯，把行商浪人这段话记下来，我要加进我的论点汇编里。那么，我们算是达成共识了，对吧？”
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

traits.locale_text: “精彩！您已经抓住了问题的核心，而且言简意赅。努恩修斯，把行商浪人这段话记下来，我要加进我的论点汇编里。那么，我们算是达成共识了，对吧？”

languages.text: « Magnifique ! Vous avez saisi l'essence même de la question et l'avez articulée avec concision. Nuncius, note bien la formulation {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, je vais l'ajouter à ma liste d'arguments. Ai-je raison de penser que nous sommes donc d'accord ? »
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

traits.locale_text: « Magnifique ! Vous avez saisi l'essence même de la question et l'avez articulée avec concision. Nuncius, note bien la formulation {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, je vais l'ajouter à ma liste d'arguments. Ai-je raison de penser que nous sommes donc d'accord ? »

languages.text: "Brillant! Ihr haben die Crux an der Sache erkannt und prägnant auf den Punkt gebracht. Nuncius, notiert Euch die Wortwahl {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, während ich sie meinem Katalog von Argumenten hinzufüge. Gehe ich recht in der Annahme, dass wir einen Konsens erzielt haben?"
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

traits.locale_text: "Brillant! Ihr haben die Crux an der Sache erkannt und prägnant auf den Punkt gebracht. Nuncius, notiert Euch die Wortwahl {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, während ich sie meinem Katalog von Argumenten hinzufüge. Gehe ich recht in der Annahme, dass wir einen Konsens erzielt haben?"

languages.text: 「素晴らしい！あなたは問題の核心をつかみ、それを簡潔に表現した。ヌンキウス、ローグ・トレーダーの言い回しをメモしておいてくれ。私たちは合意に達したということでよろしいですね？」
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"

traits.locale_text: 「素晴らしい！あなたは問題の核心をつかみ、それを簡潔に表現した。ヌンキウス、ローグ・トレーダーの言い回しをメモしておいてくれ。私たちは合意に達したということでよろしいですね？」

languages.text: "Muhteşem! Meselenin özünü kavramışsınız. Bunu çok net bir şekilde dile getirdiniz. Nuncius, Hür Tacir'in ifadelerini not al ki argüman fihristime ekleyebileyim. Bir fikir birliğine vardığımızı düşünmekte haklı mıyım?"
languages.original_text: "Brilliant! You have grasped the very crux of the matter and articulated it with concision. Nuncius, make note of the Rogue Trader's phrasing, and I will add it to my catalogue of arguments. Am I right in thinking that we have reached a consensus?"
